market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Quiet 4‑Guest Home with Private Hot Tub
Relaxing Entire Home – Jacuzzi Bath, Sleeps 4
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your tranquil getaway in the heart of the city. This entire home comfortably sleeps up to four guests, offering a peaceful space for families, friends, or couples looking to unwind. The standout feature is the private jacuzzi tub, perfect for relaxing after a day of exploring. Guests enjoy a fully equipped kitchen, a cozy living area, and two well‑appointed bedrooms designed for restful sleep. 

At £168 per night, the home provides great value for a premium experience. Although the listing is new—host Oliver has zero years of hosting experience and is not yet a Superhost—the property has already earned nine reviews, averaging a 3.0 rating. This early feedback highlights the potential for improvement and a chance for you to shape the guest experience from the start. 

The property is available for 75 open nights over the next 90 days, presenting a significant opportunity to fill dates and generate up to £12,600 in revenue at the current rate. Whether you’re planning a short city break or a longer retreat, this home offers the privacy, comfort, and unique jacuzzi amenity that will make your stay memorable. Book now and be among the first to enjoy this serene space.
top_amenity_gaps: Private outdoor space (e.g., patio or garden)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution image of the jacuzzi‑tub bathroom as the cover photo, as it showcases the property’s unique selling point and will attract clicks.
key_diagnosis: Capitalize on the 75 open nights (83.7% of the next 90 days) to generate up to £12,600 in potential revenue at the current £168 rate.
Add at least one high‑value amenity such as a dedicated parking space; none are listed for this property, and parking is a top demand in the 357‑listing cohort.
Upload a minimum of 5 professional photos covering bedroom, living room, kitchen, exterior, and the jacuzzi‑tub bathroom to match market expectations and improve visual appeal.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 75 open nights over the next 90 days, representing a potential revenue of £12,600 at your current £168 nightly rate.
